message:
feat(db): enhance connection pool resilience and search integration

Connection Pool Improvements (pool.rs):
- Add comprehensive connection health checking with configurable
  timeout thresholds
- Implement automatic connection recycling for stale connections
- Add retry logic with exponential backoff for transient failures
- Improve error categorization (transient vs permanent failures)
- Add connection lifecycle metrics for observability
- Better handling of WAL checkpoint operations

Search Service Integration (search_service.rs):
- Wire up two-tier semantic search into the query execution path
- Add hybrid search combining lexical and semantic results
- Implement score fusion with configurable blending weights
- Add fallback paths when semantic search is unavailable
- Improve query plan logging for debugging

Test Updates (query_integration.rs):
- Update integration tests for new search service behavior
- Add test coverage for hybrid search scenarios

These changes significantly improve database reliability under load
and enable the new two-tier semantic search capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
